result.summary: Signicat exposes a suite of OAuth-protected HTTP APIs on developer.signicat.com covering authentication, identity verification, signing, workflow orchestration, monitoring, account/admin, usage, and related trust services; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
result.description: Signicat is a European digital identity and trust services provider. It helps organisations verify identities, onboard customers, authenticate users, sign documents electronically, and automate identity and compliance workflows.

signicat_oauth_client.label: Signicat API OAuth client credentials
signicat_oauth_client.setup: Create or obtain API credentials for your Signicat account in the Signicat management portal, then use the OAuth 2.0 client-credentials flow described in [Connect to Signicat APIs](https://developer.signicat.com/docs/connect-to-signicat-apis/) and [Access tokens](https://developer.signicat.com/docs/connect-to-signicat-apis/advanced-settings/access-tokens/) to mint bearer access tokens for API calls. The docs identify OAuth 2.0 access tokens as the standard authentication mechanism for Signicat APIs.
